headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Monster Beverage, Lowers Price Target to $90
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Chris Carey   maintains Monster Beverage (NASDAQ:MNST) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $94 to $90.

headline: 3 Market-Beating Stocks Worth Your Attention
summary: Stocks that outperform the market usually share key traits such as rising sales, expanding margins, and increasing returns on capital. The select few that can do all three for many years are often the ones that make you life-changing money.
